title: The Dark-Knowing Chamber

features.name: root-sense chamber pool
features.desc-on-touch: you cannot see this pool but you know it by pressure and temperature. it teaches you that knowing exists without light. your roots would recognize it.

features.name: frequency-tower of deep-sound
features.desc-on-touch: it hums at frequencies your eyes cannot follow. your bones know every note. the archive goes deeper by listening rather than seeing.

features.name: tactile naming glyph
features.desc-on-touch: each letter is a texture. reading means touching. the chamber names itself in a language that light has never known.

features.name: subsonic arch
features.desc-on-touch: it frames an opening you cannot see through. it defines a passage by sound and pressure alone. beyond it, understanding continues.

features.name: bioluminescent circuit-vine
features.desc-on-touch: it glows without burning. each node is a thought transmitted through darkness. the archive teaches itself through bioluminescence.

features.name: earth-knowledge stack
features.desc-on-touch: layer upon layer of soil-thought. each stratum is a year of underground memory. here the archive reads what only roots have ever understood.

inscription: light stops here but knowledge continues in frequencies with no names yet, in colours only roots remember

file.name: Subsonic_Archive_Witness_Fragment.wav
file.note: STATUS: germinating — recordings of what the chamber knows by pressure and vibration alone, frequencies below sight, understanding that travels through soil

exits.label: upward toward the last traces of measureable light
deeper still, where even roots must stop and root-knowledge must transform into something else
toward the eastern edge of the understory where understanding starts to separate into many frequencies
westward along the understory where other forms of knowing wait in shadow
